intended_use: LVivo platform is intended for non-invasive processing of ultrasound images to detect, measure, and calculate relevant medical parameters of structures and function of patients with suspected disease.
intended_use_full: LVivo platform is intended for non-invasive processing of ultrasound images to detect, measure, and calculate relevant medical parameters of structures and function of patients with suspected disease.
target_condition: Suspected cardiac disease and bladder abnormalities
ground_truth: Reference echocardiography measurements (WSMI for wall motion); biplane manual analysis
other_metrics: Ejection fraction (EF) biplane correlation >=80%; kappa and correlation values compared to reference standard for wall motion and global longitudinal strain; cutoff value <-17 for GLS
